directive: For normal PRs, direct main fixes, or ship-it work, do not edit CHANGELOG.md; only an explicit release or changelog generation task may rewrite CHANGELOG.md.
rationale: The repository treats CHANGELOG.md as release-owned generated/release output. Normal development should put release-note context in PR metadata or commit text rather than touching the changelog file directly.

source_evidence.quote: `CHANGELOG.md`: release-owned. Do not edit for normal PRs, direct `main` fixes, or `ship it`; only explicit release/changelog generation may rewrite it.
